item.command: /usr/bin/zsh -lc 'for p in data/candidate-changes/candidate-review-candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21-repair-taxonomy-mapping-repair.json data/evidence-reviews/candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21-repair-taxonomy-mapping.json; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$p EXISTS"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$p"; else printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$p MISSING"; fi; done'

/usr/bin/zsh -lc 'for p in data/candidate-changes/candidate-review-candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21-repair-taxonomy-mapping-repair.json data/evidence-reviews/candidate-revision-senolytics-scaffold-bootstrap-2026-06-21-repair-taxonomy-mapping.json; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$p EXISTS"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$p"; else printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$p MISSING"; fi; done'
